CurrentIssues.ID: LongMethod:SettingsScreen.kt$@OptIn(ExperimentalMaterial3Api::class) @Composable fun SettingsScreen( onBack: () -> Unit, onDisconnected: () -> Unit, onBrowsePerformers: () -> Unit = {}, onBrowseStudios: () -> Unit = {}, onBrowseTags: () -> Unit = {}, viewModel: SettingsViewModel = hiltViewModel(), )
